summary: Single Team subscriber out of market non-subscribed team - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND a game includes the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the feed level entitled equals true for the subscribed-to-team
AND the feed level entitled equals false for the non-subscribed-to-team

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a game tile for an in-progress game of the subscribed-to-team
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays on the feed button for the not entitled team
AND the user is able to play the feed of the subscribed-to-team
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page after clicking the feed button for the non-subscrined-to-team
AND the user is navigated back to the selected game tile after pressing the "back" button on the controller
